allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d.get\('pagination',{}\); accounts=d.get\('accounts',[]\); print\('currentPage:', p.get\('currentPage'\)\); print\('accounts returned:', len\(accounts\)\); print\('first 3 IDs:', [a['accountId'] for a in accounts[:3]]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); accounts=d.get\('accounts',[]\); print\('page=1 first 3 IDs:', [a['accountId'] for a in accounts[:3]]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); accounts=d.get\('accounts',[]\); p=d.get\('pagination',{}\); print\('alt params page=1 first 3 IDs:', [a['accountId'] for a in accounts[:3]]\); print\('totalPages:', p.get\('totalPages'\)\)")
